short_summary: Iran deal, Tren de Aragua strike
rationale: Trump's Tren de Aragua airstrike claim is a continuation of last cycle's confirmed action; Iran deal status unchanged with Beirut strikes complicating picture.

top_events.title: Trump confirms US killed Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump publicly confirmed the US airstrike killing the Venezuelan gang leader — a continuation of last cycle's action now with official presidential endorsement, reinforcing domestic security messaging.

top_events.title: Trump says Iran deal still close despite condemning Beirut strikes
top_events.summary: Trump's mixed signals — condemning Israeli strikes while claiming Iran deal is near — keep oil market uncertainty alive and US diplomatic credibility in question.

top_events.title: Thousands protest as world leaders gather for G7 summit
top_events.summary: G7 summit with Trump attending draws large protests; potential for policy announcements on trade, Ukraine aid, or tariffs that could affect US economic direction.
